impact: The AWS BAA date/evidence location, IAM Identity Center instance, single-account launch decision, and successful staging CDK deploy evidence are now recorded for account 329425487030. Production readiness still depends on creating GitHub OIDC deploy roles, confirming account-wide MFA/key posture, selecting a security findings contact path, populating live secret values in AWS Secrets Manager, and enabling CloudTrail and GuardDuty. Production deployment must not treat the remaining TODO evidence fields as complete.
title: AWS account IDs and BAA evidence still need real source values
